title: SSJU M.Com, MA, M.Sc Time Table 2026 – Download Schedule Time Table 2026 Overview

detail.title: SSJU M.Com, MA, M.Sc Time Table 2026 – Download Schedule Time Table 2026 Overview
detail.short_info: The officials of SSJU have released the SSJU Time Table 2026 for M.Com, MA, M.Sc Programmes. Students are advised to check the timetable to prepare for their exams.

content.text: Shri Shivaji University (SSJU) has officially released the M.Com, MA, M.Sc 1st and 3rd Semester Time Table 2026 on 22-03-2026. The timetable is now available for students online on the official SSJU portal. Knowing the Time Table in advance helps students effectively plan their exam preparation.

Students can check and download the official schedule by visiting the SSJU portal at ssju.ac.in or using the direct link provided below. It is recommended to download and save the timetable PDF for easy access and future reference.

sections.heading: SSJU M.Com, MA, M.Sc Time Table 2026 – Download Schedule Time Table 2026 Overview

content.text: SSJU M.Com, MA, M.Sc Time Table 2026 – Download Schedule has published the Time Table on its official site for the . The table below highlights key details such as release date, academic session, and official link to the timetable PDF.

sections.heading: SSJU M.Com, MA, M.Sc Time Table 2026 – Download Schedule Time Table 2026 - Exam Dates

content.text: SSJU M.Com, MA, M.Sc Time Table 2026 – Download Schedule has released the official Time Table 2026. The following table lists the subject-wise exam dates and schedule as per the official notification.
The detailed subject-wise schedule is available in the official PDF. Download the timetable PDF here to view complete exam dates, paper codes, and timings.

sections.heading: SSJU M.Com, MA, M.Sc Time Table 2026 – Download Schedule Time Table 2026 Direct Download Link

content.text: SSJU M.Com, MA, M.Sc Time Table 2026 – Download Schedule has activated the official PDF download link for the Time Table 2026. Students enrolled under the can directly access and download their complete schedule using the link provided below.

sections.heading: How to Download SSJU M.Com, MA, M.Sc Time Table 2026 – Download Schedule Time Table 2026 Online?

content.text: SSJU has simplified the Time Table access process for M.Com, MA, M.Sc students. Most timetables can be downloaded without login. Follow these steps to get your Time Table PDF:

items: Visit the official SSJU website - ssju.ac.in
Go to the Examination or Academic Schedule section
Select your M.Com, MA, M.Sc 1st and 3rd Semester from the listed schedules
Locate the correct Time Table for 2026
Click to open the timetable in PDF format
Download or save the file on your device
Review the schedule carefully - verify exam dates, subject names, and time slots
